caption:
Such a pleasure sitting down in the beautiful new premises of Pantheon Development with owner and developer Kalpesh Kinariwala, the visionary behind one of the most exciting new launches in Jumeirah Village Triangle: Voxa Residences.

This is not just another project. Voxa is a fully integrated lifestyle concept blending residential, retail, and workspace into one seamless ecosystem, designed for how people actually live today. With 24+ world-class amenities (from beach-style pools and outdoor cinema to wellness zones, padel courts, and even pet-friendly spaces), it’s no surprise it’s quickly becoming a favourite among both end-users and investors. 

What stood out to me most is Pantheon’s philosophy: affordable luxury, delivered with consistency and on time - something they’ve built a strong reputation for across multiple successful projects in Dubai. 

Kalpesh himself is incredibly grounded, sharp, and deeply hands-on (with a great sense of humour!). The kind of developer who understands not just construction, but market psychology, investor expectations, and long-term value creation.

Thank you for such a warm, candid, and insightful conversation. These are the kind of discussions that remind me why I love this industry. @kalpesh.kinariwala @director_pantheon_developments @pantheon_development 

#offplandubai #dubairealestate #investindubai #voxa #dubaipropertymarket

A few words from our guests  honest impressions from those who value quality, purpose, and consistency. 

#PANTHEONDevelopment

We had the opportunity to join fellow founders and senior leaders from across the development sector at the CBNME RAK Roundtable for a constructive and insightful conversation about the future of Ras Al Khaimah’s real estate landscape.

Our discussion touched on the emirate’s key growth drivers, the expanding influence of waterfront‑led master planning on Al Marjan Island, and how “RAK luxury” continues to evolve in line with maturing investor expectations. We shared our outlook for Pantheon Development’s upcoming work in Ras Al Khaimah, focusing on thoughtful, design‑led development, long‑term value creation, and ensuring our efforts remain aligned with the emirate’s broader growth trajectory.

The dialogue also explored the rise of branded residences, shifting buyer trends, and the importance of upholding design quality, delivery discipline, and year‑round livability as development activity across the emirate continues to scale.

caption:
It gives me great pride to share highlights from the unveiling of RAK Central in Ras Al Khaimah, a progressive integrated destination for living and business, now ready for activation.

Spanning 3.1 million sq. ft. of prime land with 8.37 million sq. ft. of gross floor area, RAK Central is built to LIVE, WORK & PLAY and stands as a cornerstone of RAK Vision 2030, which targets 3.5 million tourists by 2030.

Pantheon Development is proud to hold a significant stake in this transformation, with 25% of the 4,000 residential units and 15% of the total plots, representing a GDV of AED 1.6 billion.

This milestone reflects the leadership of His Highness Sheikh Saud bin Saqr Al Qasimi, Ruler of Ras Al Khaimah, and the visionary guidance of Arch. Abdulla Al Abdouli, Group CEO of Marjan, alongside partners including Mr. Ramy Jallad, Group CEO of RAKEZ.

With landmark projects such as the Wynn Resort on the horizon, Ras Al Khaimah is poised for extraordinary growth, and Pantheon is proud to be building that future. 🌍🏗

#PantheonDevelopment #RAKCentral #RasAlKhaimah #KalpeshKinariwala #VisionForTheFuture #UAE #Marjan #ORC #OneRAKCentral
locationName: Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates

caption:
Marjan is pleased to announce the completion of infrastructure works at RAK Central in Ras Al Khaimah, marking a key step in the development of the emirate’s emerging business hub. 
Our CEO, Arch. Abdulla Al Abdouli, unveiled the development, set to welcome over 6,000 professionals and 4,000 residences. With ALEC appointed as the main contractor for the RAK Central HQ Office Complex, this achievement reinforces Marjan’s vision to create a world-class hub where business, lifestyle, and tourism come together seamlessly. 
 
#MarjanRAK #RAKCentral #Marjan #RasAlKhaimah

تعلن مرجان اكتمال أعمال البنية التحتية في راك سنترال برأس الخيمة. ويُعد هذا إنجازًا مهمًا في تطوير وجهة الأعمال القادمة في الإمارة، وهي وجهة حيوية متكاملة لـ‘العمل-العيش-الترفيه’ تتماشى مع رؤية رأس الخيمة 2030. 
وقد كشف الرئيس التنفيذي، المهندس عبد الله العبدولي، عن التطوير، مع تعيين مجموعة أليك للهندسة والمقاولات مقاولًا رئيسيًا لمجمع المكاتب الرئيسي في راك سنترال، والذي سيستقبل أكثر من 6000 موظف ويضم 4000 وحدة سكنية. ويجسّد هذا رؤية مرجان لإنشاء وجهة عالمية تجمع بين الأعمال وأسلوب الحياة والترفيه.

caption:
We are proud to share that Pantheon Development was among the very first to believe in Ras Al Khaimah’s bold vision. Together with Marjan, the master developer shaping the emirate’s future, we stand at the forefront of this journey.

RAK Central is a progressive 3.1 million sq. ft. mixed-use development in Ras Al Khaimah, designed for you to LIVE, WORK & PLAY. It offers dynamic office spaces, premium residences with scenic views, pedestrian-friendly green areas, and outstanding amenities, creating a vibrant ecosystem that empowers both people and businesses to thrive.

At Pantheon, we are proud to hold a significant stake in shaping this transformation. Within RAK Central, Pantheon commands 25% of the 4,000 residential units, along with 15% of the total plots available, underlining our leadership and commitment. Together, these holdings represent a Gross Development Value (GDV) of AED 1.6 billion, reflecting both the scale of our vision and the confidence we have always had in Ras Al Khaimah’s future.

It was an honor to be part of this visionary gathering alongside Arch. Abdulla Al Abdouli, Group CEO of Marjan, whose visionary leadership and relentless drive have been the cornerstone of Ras Al Khaimah’s transformation; Mr. Ramy Jallad, Group CEO of Ras Al Khaimah Economic Zone (RAKEZ) and Mr. Sean McQue, Managing Director (Construction) at ALEC, along with other leading developers who share this collective ambition for the emirate’s bright future.

As we look ahead, Pantheon stands firmly aligned with the emirate’s promising future, a land blessed with its unique landscape, the sea, and unmatched opportunities. With landmark projects like the Wynn Resort on the horizon, Ras Al Khaimah is set to redefine growth, opportunity, and world-class living. 🌍🏗🌊

The journey ahead is extraordinary, and we’re proud to be building tomorrow, today. 💡

#PantheonDevelopment #RAKCentral #RasAlKhaimah #VisionForTheFuture #UAE #Marjan #ORC #OneRAKCentral
